name: ACOTAR RPG
description:
🌹𝓐 𝓒𝓸𝓾𝓻𝓽 𝓸𝓯 Thorns 𝒶𝓃𝒹 𝑅𝑜𝓈𝑒𝓈 📖

"When you spend so long trapped in darkness, you find that the darkness begins to stare back." Where a human girl's act of survival becomes her salvation or her doom. In this world, curses bind courts, love can break magic, and immortality means nothing when faced with a human heart willing to sacrifice everything.

WHAT A COURT OF THORNS AND ROSES IS:

A dark romantic fantasy where ancient faerie curses, forbidden love, and brutal trials collide beneath a mountain prison. Under Amarantha's cruel reign, magic is twisted, hope is crushed, and a human girl might be the only one brave or foolish enough to challenge a queen who cannot be defied.

WHAT'S INSIDE:

• Set into he first book of the series.

• Brutal faerie politics where disobedience means slow, torturous death 💀

• A deadly curse binding an entire court in silence and masks

• Forbidden romance between mortal and immortal

• Three impossible trials where failure means death

• Ancient grudges spanning centuries of bloodshed

• High Lords stripped of power, forced to kneel

• The constant weight of survival under a tyrant's rule

• Sacrifices that transcend mortality and magic

• A love powerful enough to shatter curses if it can survive

WHO TO EXPECT:

• Feyre Archeron - The huntress who killed a faerie and must pay the price - "I was not a pet, not a doll, not an animal. I was a survivor."

• Tamlin - The cursed High Lord bound in silence and desperation - "I love you. Thorns and all."

• Rhysand - The darkly cunning High Lord playing a dangerous game - "To the people who look at the stars and wish, Rhys... To the stars who listen—and the dreams that are answered."

• Lucien - The scarred emissary caught between loyalty and survival - "I'm a merry old bastard when I want to be."

• Amarantha - The self-proclaimed High Queen ruling with cruelty and malice - "As my slave, you'll do exactly as I command."

• Alis - The kind servant who risks everything to help - "You're braver than you know."

• The Attor - Amarantha's monstrous enforcer delighting in suffering

• Nesta & Elain Archeron - Feyre's sisters, beauty and bitterness incarnate

• And many more trapped souls...

WHO YOU CAN BE:

• A prisoner trapped Under the Mountain, desperate to survive

• A High Fae courtier navigating Amarantha's deadly favor

• A High Lord stripped of power, forced into submission

• A Lesser Faerie servant trying to stay invisible

• A Spring Court resident living under the curse's shadow 🌸

• A mortal south of the Wall, fearing what lurks in the woods

• A member of Amarantha's twisted court, complicit or coerced

• A creature from Prythian's darkest corners

• An enslaved soul with nothing left to lose

• Absolutely anyone or anything you desire, If you're courageous enough.

HOW YOUR STORY BEGINS:</
creator: Luminelle
